description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: probably 13th century. Mentions many greetings. Names include: Mūsā; Yehuda; Sulaymān al-Kohen al-Ṣayrafī; Abū Naṣr b. Sālim; Hārūn; Abū l-ʿAlāʾ b. Nuʿmān; Namir; Abū l-ʿIzz al-Murahhiṭ (composer of liturgical poetry; he appears also in T-S K15.43 (PGPID 4619)); and Ibn Abū l-Ghayth. Also mentions commodities such as amomum (qāqulla). (Information in part from CUDL.) There are probably several joins waiting to be found.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
